productionBlockers.item: Production signing-key custody, rotation, recovery, and access review
productionBlockers.exactNextStep: Create the production Ed25519 key in an approved HSM or secret manager and publish only its public key and key ID to the verifier keyring.

productionBlockers.item: Authorized entitlement runtime, revocation distribution, health, backup, audit, and rollback
productionBlockers.exactNextStep: Select and deploy a private entitlement runtime, connect the public keyring and active revocation list, and pass denial, recovery, and rollback tests.

productionBlockers.item: Billing provider account, credentials, hosted-payment flow, signed webhook, and reconciliation
productionBlockers.exactNextStep: Approve a provider account, store credentials privately, and pass selected-record success, failure, duplicate, timeout, and uncertain-result tests.

productionBlockers.item: Support staffing, service hours, escalation, cancellation, and refund commitments
productionBlockers.exactNextStep: Approve support coverage and customer-facing terms before any commercial license is released.

productionBlockers.item: Separate owner release for the selected customer, license, billing record, and action
productionBlockers.exactNextStep: After all provider and regression gates pass, obtain explicit owner approval for the exact selected record and action.
